=====Pokémon=====

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=May
|pkmn=Aggron
|type1=Steel
|type2=Rock
|img=May Aggron Evolutions.png
|epnum=PE06
|epname=The Wish
|vajp=Shogo Sakata
|desc={{p|Aggron}} is May's second known Pokémon. She used it to battle {{p|Rayquaza}}, but recalled it when it failed to hit the [[Legendary Pokémon]].

Aggron's only known move is {{m|Stone Edge}}.}}

{{anchor|Altaria 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=May
|pkmn=Altaria 
|type1=Dragon
|type2=Flying
|img=May Altaria Evolutions.png
|epnum=PE06
|epname=The Wish
|desc=Altaria is May's third known Pokémon. She used it to battle {{p|Rayquaza}}, but it was defeated.

Altaria's only known move is {{m|Dragon Pulse}}.}}

{{anchor|Swampert 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=May
|pkmn=Swampert
|mega=yes
|type1=Water
|type2=Ground
|img=May Mega Swampert Evolutions.png
|cap=May's Mega Swampert
|epnum=PE06
|epname=The Wish
|desc={{p|Swampert}} is May's fourth known Pokémon, and is capable of [[Mega Evolution|Mega Evolving]]. She used it to battle {{p|Rayquaza}}, managing to weaken it enough for her to catch it.

Swampert's only known move is {{m|Ice Punch}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=May
|pkmn=Rayquaza
|mega=yes
|type1=Dragon
|type2=Flying
|img=May Rayquaza Evolutions.png
|cap=May's Rayquaza
|img2=May Mega Rayquaza Evolutions.png
|cap2=May's Mega Rayquaza
|epnum=PE06
|epname=The Wish
|desc={{p|Rayquaza}} is May's fifth known Pokémon. [[Zinnia]] summoned it to the [[Sky Pillar]] to stop a [[Grand Meteor Delta|giant meteorite]] headed for [[Hoenn]], but was unable to trigger its [[Mega Evolution]]. After May had fed Rayquaza her [[Meteorite]], Zinnia let May battle and catch Rayquaza. Afterwards, May used Rayquaza in its Mega Evolved form in a battle against Zinnia's Mega {{TP|Zinnia|Salamence}}.

Rayquaza's only known move is {{m|Extreme Speed}}.}}
